summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of LaCleo.ai major update with new origami.chat style UI. All critical functionality working perfectly including landing page, registration, dashboard chat interface, templates, AI search, and export features.
passed_tests: Backend: All 16 API endpoints working perfectly (health, auth/register, auth/login, auth/me, search, templates/categories, templates, templates/run, personalize, lookalikes, enrich, stats, conversations, leads)
Landing page loads with new origami.chat style - clean white background, proper spacing and typography
Hero search box with 4 modes: Find People, Find Companies, Scrape Websites, Enrich Data - all modes clickable and functional
Quick actions visible and properly styled: Personalize for You, Importing CSV, Find Numbers and Emails, Find Lookalikes
Demo results table displays YC W26 Founders with proper fit scores (97, 95, 93, 91, 89, etc.)
User registration flow works perfectly - form validation, successful redirect to dashboard
Dashboard loads with chat-style interface - 'How can I help you find customers?' welcome message
Template categories load correctly (Popular, Healthcare, Fintech, E-commerce, Biotech, Proptech) with proper counts
Template cards display correctly with descriptions and column badges
AI search generates results with fit scores - both people and company search working
Results table displays with proper columns: Fit Score, Company, Contact, Title, etc.
Export CSV functionality works - download triggers successfully
Company enrichment modal opens and displays enriched data (technologies, news, industry info)
New Search button resets to template view correctly
User menu and logout functionality works properly
Template execution works - YC Founders template runs and shows proper results
Search input accepts prompts and mode selection works (Find People vs Find Companies)
Mocked AI integrations working correctly (all lead data properly mocked as specified)

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 16 API endpoints functioning perfectly with new origami.chat style architecture
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - Landing page, registration, dashboard, and all UI components working flawlessly
